title: China says it is the world leader in R&D for AI, vows to boost tech self
description: China declared on Thursday that it was now the world leader in research and development for artificial intelligence as well as other key fields such as quantum technology, and vowed to accelerate efforts to achieve greater tech self-reliance.

title: Banking giant Morgan Stanley cuts 2,500 jobs globally despite record 2025 revenue
description: The investment banking giant reduces approximately 2,500 jobs globally following a record revenue year, citing strategic and performance-based reasons as volatile markets and artificial intelligence adoption reshape the industry.
content:
New York-based investment banking giant Morgan Stanley has laid off around 2,500 employees -- roughly 3 per cent of its global workforce -- across all divisions, news agency Reuters reported.
The job cuts span the bank’s three major divisions -- inve... [1587 chars]

title: OpenAI tops $25 billion in annualized revenue, The Information reports
description: Artificial intelligence startup OpenAI topped $25 billion in annualized revenue as of ​the end of last month, The Information ‌reported on Wednesday, citing a person familiar with the figure.
content:
March 4 (Reuters) - Artificial intelligence startup OpenAI topped $25 billion in annualized revenue as of ​the end of last month, The Information ‌reported on Wednesday, citing a person familiar with the figure.

title: How to Mirror Your Unique Voice with AI
description: Content is the bridge between a brand and its audience in this modern digital era. title: New fragmentome technology can detect early liver fibrosis and cirrhosis
description: Researchers at the Johns Hopkins Kimmel Cancer Center report that an artificial intelligence (AI)-based liquid biopsy test using genome-wide cell-free DNA (cfDNA) fragmentation patterns and repeat landscapes can detect early liver fibrosis and cirrhosis, and may also reveal signals of broader chronic disease burden.
